params.footer_content: Kanso is a free career self-assessment tool for individual contributors and job seekers. It identifies your real workplace trade-off hierarchy — not a personality archetype, but a ranked picture of what you'd protect, what you'd compromise on, and what your current role is actually costing you. A 20-question assessment allocates limited credits across culture, compensation, professional fit, and personal life to surface your true priorities. Results include a personalised trade-off profile, key drivers, strategic recommendations, and access to Clarity Coach — an AI-powered virtual coaching interface for exploring your priorities and evaluating roles.

metadata.meta_description: Kanso is a free self-assessment tool that helps individual contributors and job seekers identify their real career trade-offs. A 20-question quiz surfaces what you'd protect, what you'd sacrifice, and where your current role is falling short - then unlocks Clarity Coach, an AI coaching interface personalised to your results.

web_application.name: Kanso
web_application.offer_description: Free during early access. No credit card required.
web_application.description: Kanso is a career self-assessment tool that helps individual contributors and job seekers identify their real workplace trade-off hierarchy. Unlike personality tests or job-matching tools, Kanso measures trade-offs: users allocate a limited number of credits across 20 factors spanning culture, compensation, professional fit, and personal life. The result is a personalised trade-off profile that shows what the user would protect, what they would sacrifice, and where their current role is misaligned with their actual priorities. Results include key drivers, tension analysis between competing priorities, strategic recommendations, and deep-dives into each non-negotiable. Users also unlock Clarity Coach - an AI-powered virtual coaching interface trained on their profile - which they can use to explore why a driver matters, evaluate whether a new role is a genuine fit, or prepare for conversations with their manager. Kanso does not assign personality types, color codes, or archetypes. It is built for people who already know something feels off but cannot name it precisely enough to act.
web_application.audience_type: Individual contributors, job seekers, and career changers who want to understand their real career priorities and trade-offs
web_application.author_description: 30 years in software, with a decade at the intersection of technology and people strategy in the SME space. Based in Perth, Western Australia.
feature_list: 20-question trade-off assessment across culture, compensation, professional fit, and personal life
Credit-limited priority ranking to surface genuine non-negotiables
Personalised trade-off profile showing what you'd protect and what you'd sacrifice
Key driver analysis with tension mapping between competing priorities
Strategic recommendations and concrete next steps
Clarity Coach: an AI-powered virtual coaching interface personalised to your results
web_application.keywords: career trade-off assessment, Kanso, work priorities, job satisfaction, non-negotiables, career values, career change, burnout, workplace alignment, AI career coach
